headline: CRH elects W. Anthony (Tony) Will to its Board of Directors
summary: NEW YORK, June 16, 2026--CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, today announced the election of Mr. Tony Will, 60, to the CRH Board of Directors, effective July 1, 2026.
